mission.title: atlantis: HashiCorp GPG key expired - openpgp: key expired when downloading Terraform
mission.description: HashiCorp GPG key expired - openpgp: key expired when downloading Terraform. This issue affects 40+ users.

steps.title: Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
### Overview of the Issue

HashiCorp's GPG key (`72D7468F`) expired on April 18, 2026, causing Atlantis to fail when downloading Terraform binaries.

steps.title: Apply the fix for HashiCorp GPG key expired - openpgp: key expired when…
steps.description:
## What
- Bumps `github.com/hashicorp/hc-install` from v0.9.2 to v0.9.4
- Bumps Go from 1.25.4 to 1.25.8 in `go.mod` and `Dockerfile`
- Bumps Go from 1.25.3 to 1.25.8 in `testing/Dockerfile`

## Why
hc-install v0.9.4 requires `go >= 1.25.8`. All Dockerfile base images updated to match.

##
```yaml
error downloading terraform version 1.14.8: unable to verify checksums signature: openpgp: key expired
```

steps.title: Upgrade atlantis to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade atlantis:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade atlantis atlantis/atlantis --namespace atlantis
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis
helm list -n atlantis
```

steps.title: Confirm HashiCorp GPG key expired - openpgp: key expired… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## What
- Bumps `github.com/hashicorp/hc-install` from v0.9.2 to v0.9.4
- Bumps Go from 1.25.4 to 1.25.8 in `go.mod` and `Dockerfile`
- Bumps Go from 1.25.3 to 1.25.8 in `testing/Dockerfile`

## Why
hc-install v0.9.4 requires `go >= 1.25.8`. All Dockerfile base images updated to match.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
